title: Validation Gates (lifecycle_hooks + telemetry)
description: Additive, OPTIONAL configuration for deterministic validation gates in .autoharness/config.yaml. Validates the design-doc section 5 contract: the lifecycle_hooks block (pre_execution actions and pre_task_completion validation_gates) and the telemetry block. The entire lifecycle_hooks and telemetry blocks are optional; an absent block means no gates run and behavior is identical to an install without gates.

interpolated_command.description: Interpolated command/write-back template. Only the closed placeholder vocabulary {file_path}, {task_id}, {result} is permitted. Any other {placeholder} or stray brace is rejected so subprocess construction stays auditable and injection-safe.

action.description: Namespaced action: internal:<fn> for an autoharness built-in, or shell:<cmd> for an external command.

enforcement.description: absolute = hard stop the agent cannot bypass (default). advisory = failing gates warn but do not block.

lifecycle_hooks.description: Deterministic lifecycle hooks. Entirely optional; an absent, null, or empty block disables gating (kill-switch).

pre_execution.description: Actions evaluated before a task begins (e.g. complexity sizing).

name.description: Unique name of the pre-execution action within the list.

condition.description: Optional condition expression. Defaults to always-run when omitted.

pre_task_completion.description: Gate policy and validation gates evaluated before a task may transition to a completed state.

on_repeated_failure.description: block = force the task to blocked and requeue after max_gate_failures (default). escalate = route to a heavier model tier first, then block.

max_gate_failures.description: Consecutive gate-failure count that trips block+requeue. Default 3, aligned with the circuit-breaker MAXIMUM_RETRY_THRESHOLD.

validation_gates.description: Per-pattern validation gates. Each matched modified file is validated by the mapped command.

pattern.description: Doublestar glob over forward-slash-normalized, repo-relative paths.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard per-file timeout in seconds. The subprocess is killed when exceeded.

telemetry.description: Optional telemetry configuration. Phase 1 does not build the telemetry sink; these keys are reserved and validated for forward compatibility. May be null/absent.

mode.description: Telemetry sink mode. Defaults to none.

database_path.description: Repo-relative path to the local telemetry database (Phase 2).

emit_jsonl.description: Whether to emit JSONL telemetry (Phase 2). Defaults to false.
